Hunter Schenewark heard about line striping on this podcast, grabbed a machine, and nine weeks later walked away with nearly $50,000 in revenue,  with zero experience and a beat-up minivan. We met up with Hunter at a church parking lot in action to break down exactly how he did it. Starting with a free job posted on a local Facebook group and a handful of cold emails, he built a pipeline fast enough to have 10 to 12 hour days six days a week in just his second month. We walk through how he prices striping by the line, why seal coating became the real money maker, how he landed a $26,000 job showing up in a minivan, the equipment he bought to get started, and the cold email strategy that brought it all together вАФ no door knocking required.

Enjoy!
